title: Domina Nocturna
overview: Wandering through a dead city, Angelique is stricken with visions and gets to know the story of a cruel vampiress who does not know love, of a ritual that imprisons Satan worshipers in a death cycle, of a witch looking for the perfect recipe and of a passion that survives beyond the grave. In Angelique's ears, only the music of the gothic inflows - no voice can rise above it.
